title: potentilla angelliae
intro: Potentilla angelliae, also known as Angel's Feather Clover, is a rare and endangered plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla angelliae include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Potentilla angelliae can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, but due to its rarity and potential toxicity, it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional or an experienced herbalist before using it.
